description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a two-story structure. The exterior is clad in light-colored brickwork, with several rectangular windows arranged in a simple, functional pattern. The property includes a well-maintained front yard enclosed by a tall hedge, containing a small garden, trees, and outdoor seating. The main entrance is accessible via a set of steps and is marked by a simple door with a small overhang. The rear of the house opens onto a private garden area, providing additional outdoor living space. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and designed for urban residential living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, brick exterior, and a landscaped front yard enclosed by hedges. Features include rectangular windows, a simple entryway, and private garden areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the house, the brick facade, and the full extent of the hedged garden with trees and a small structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, two upper windows, and the door with a small overhang, as well as the brickwork and part of the hedge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brick wall, several small windows, and the continuation of the garden and hedge.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the garden area, outdoor seating, and the back entrance, with the hedge enclosing the yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple door with a small overhang, accessed by steps, minimal decorative elements
